newsitems.title: Gravity Circuit 2 announced with the original Gravity Circuit free to claim for keeps
newsitems.contents: For a limited time you can claim a copy of the excellent Gravity Circuit to keep, to celebrate the Gravity Circuit 2 sequel announcement. Read the full article here: https://www.gamingonlinux.com/2026/06/gravity-circuit-2-announced-with-the-original-gravity-circuit-free-to-claim-for-keeps/

newsitems.title: 🚨 Gravity Circuit 2 - REVEALED! 🚨
newsitems.author: VioletAmyy
newsitems.contents: A new Ark has appeared, and Kernel City is in danger! 🔥The wait is over. Gravity Circuit 2 is officially announced and coming to PC in 2027!A mysterious Ark looms over Kernel City and the Hunter Army is on the march. Jump back into the fight as Kai, the Gravity Circuit 👊, or as a brand-new playable hero: Cable, the Power Circuit ⚡. Two Circuits who have one mission. Kernel City will not fall, not on their watch!🎬Watch the Reveal Trailer🎬Wishlist now and be ready when the fight begins: To celebrate the announcement...🎁 Gravity Circuit 1 is FREE to claim right now! 🎁That's right, the original game is yours to keep for a limited time, no strings attached. Never played it? Now is the perfect time to catch up before the sequel hits. Claim it and keep it forever.Gravity Circuit, the Overwhelmingly Positive-rated original that the community loves, is also freshly updated today with the latest Patch 1.1.2.- Developed by Domesticated Ant Games & Published by Dear VillagersLast but not the least...🏷️Dear Villagers Publisher Sale Also On Now! 🏷️More great games, more great prices. Check out the full sale here:https://store.steampowered.com/sale/dearvillagerspublishersale2026
